series_metadata.series_description: Files documenting the process by which applicants file for education assistance funds, including the application for education assistance funds, educational transcripts, FAFSA forms and information, college course and tuition information, amount of monies disbursed to applicant, and correspondence to and from the applicant.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Until proof of completion of at least one section of the CPA Exam for fund recipients ; Paper: Until proof of completion of at least one section of the CPA Exam for fund recipients; Until one year has elapsed since the application was approved, but no funds requested. Until six months after the applicant is notified of the denial of their request., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
